text:
(final and raw) 

SOURCE: Million Hearts Data Registry 

VALUES: Ex — %, ##, -##.#, MG/DL, NULL, MM HG, missing 

COMMENT: This field is only populated in the Clinical_raw file (not the Clinical_final where it is always missing). In 
the raw clinical file, values are a mixture of non-standardized values which may include values from 
test results, dosages of medications, free-form text, and other unknown values.
